name: chain_ph_launch_productbridge_agent_that_co
method: [PH LAUNCH] ProductBridge: Agent that collects feedback across multiple platforms

stages.task: Scrape PH top 20 daily launches via Playwright MCP (public, no login). Extract: product name, tagline, category, upvote count, comment count, founder Twitter handle, founder website. Also scrape PH Ship feed for pre-launch founders.

Score each launch: has founder Twitter/email (+3), cross-platform or multi-channel product (+2), agent/AI/feedback/analytics category (+2), <48h old (+3), >50 upvotes (+1). Keep total >=6. Flag ProductBridge-style products (feedback aggregation, multi-platform monitoring) as tier-1.

Generate personalized cold outreach via claude -p referencing their specific launch and pain point. Three offer variants: (1) feedback aggregation pipeline build (EAS), (2) app clone with cross-platform monitoring, (3) 'we built something similar, want a free audit?'. Queue to AUTOMATIONS/leads/ outreach pipeline and CONTENT/social/posting_queue/ for Twitter roundup.
